name: widget
description: FULL-LOOP target: the legacy summary-shell Compensation widget (jsp/fa_compensation.jsp), rebuilt in React. Faithful UI => pixel + data + behaviour parity all apply. Asserts reference the data-testid CONTRACT (see ../../CONTRACT.md). MAP fills the legacy.url; BUILD exposes these testids + wires the endpoint to the comp_*.json contract shape.

target._note: BUILD sets the real route. If the widget is embedded (iframe pattern like the dashboard), point this at its standalone dev route.

legacy._note: Best-effort deep link for capture_legacy.py (live mode). BAA is stateful; if it 500s, reach the FA Summary shell via the real menu or capture #faComp manually with the webapp-snapshot skill and drop output/baseline/widget_legacy.png + widget_legacy_data.json yourself.

journeys.title: Happy path - valid FA renders the Compensation box
No data / invalid context - the box shows its no-data state, not the table
Backend error - compensation service fails -> error state mirrors legacy
